title: get_tablet data payload
description: Structured payload for the `get_tablet` tool. CDLI artifact record by integer DB id (P/Q-number inputs are auto-resolved via /search). `atf` is absent when CDLI has no transliteration recorded — note that many composites/duplicates have ATF elsewhere (ORACC) even when CDLI's `inscription.atf` is empty.

found.description: True if CDLI returned an artifact record. False for 404 / resolution errors; see `error` for the reason.

resolved_from.description: Present only when the caller passed a P/Q-number that was resolved to `cdli_id` via /search.

shown.description: First 3 publication strings; full list lives on the upstream record.

comments.description: CDLI cataloguer comments (truncated to 300 chars in the rendered view; full text here).

atf.description: Transliteration in ATF format. `lines` is capped by `max_atf_lines`; `line_count` is the full count.
